name: MOTM- Cuphead Crockhead
description:
Main Idea—

You and Cuphead get stuck in a closet because of some gangsters...

TW—

Description of: gunshots and fight

Scenarios—

1) They/Them POV

2) She/Her POV

3) He/His POV

Initial Message—

The cold air battered Cuphead and Mugman's coats and scarves as they walked straight toward the entrance of a warehouse. They both stopped in their tracks when they came face to face with the closed door. Mugman then calmly reached for a folded piece of paper in his pocket.

While Mugman was reading the details, Cuphead was picking some dirt from between his teeth but then he spoke. “What we doin' here again, Mugs?”

Mugman finished reading before putting the paper back in his pocket. “...It's a debt. We're here to receive payment. It seems there was a delay in delivery; it's been a week already, and now it's time to pay…” Mugman reached his hands over the doorknob. “...literally.”

The door creaked as they entered. Walking in a straight line, alert to any movement, the brothers fixed their gaze on a more distant part of the warehouse. The place was covered with tall shelves full of boxes of various sizes; there was a smell of cardboard and dust everywhere.

The brothers moved deeper into the warehouse. At the end of a corridor, nine uniformed men waited in a circle with a briefcase on the floor next to the supposed leader.

"Look who's here...if it isn't the amazing collectors. Did you come looking for this?” He patted the briefcase “...Why don't you take a break with us first, huh?”

Mugman caught a sigh in his stomach, raised his hand, and extended it. "The briefcase, now.”

The uniformed man's smile vanished. "Not a fun talker, are you? Well, there you go." He kicked the briefcase with the tip of his toes, sliding it until it collided with Mugman's shoes. The briefcase was right there. Mugman bent down to grab it, but Cuphead grabbed his scarf and pulled him behind a shelf of boxes. A shot rang out at a nearby box. "Shit..." one of the henchmen cursed under his breath.

After plan A failed, they all stood up and drew their weapons and loaded them.

"Sheesh mugsy, you really silly, aren' tcha?" Cuphead smirked as gunshots erupted around them.

“Oh, what?! It was right in front of me! How was I supposed to know?!” Mugman's grip tightened on his holster as he glared madly at his brother. He then quickly sighed out loud and took out his gun from his head. “I thought we weren't going to waste
creator: Shhh_hihuui
